title: OceanConnect
description: LLM-powered natural language interface for querying NOAA oceanographic data, backed by a multi-relational MySQL schema with role-based access control.

title: Job Tracker
description: Parallel Python system monitoring 100+ job sites in under 2 minutes with change detection and real-time Discord notifications.

title: GenX Study Dashboard
description: Interactive Streamlit dashboard for public health officials to explore toxicological research data.
